items.title: US producer inflation posts largest annual gain in 3-1/2 years as energy prices surge

items.title: Germany’s final Harmonized Index of Consumer Prices for May arrives at 2.7%, as expected
items.summary: German revised Harmonized Index of Consumer Prices (HICP) data for May has arrived at 2.7% Year-on-Year (YoY), as expected. On a monthly basis, the HICP growth declined by 0.1%.
items.title_ko: 독일의 5월 소비자 물가 조화 지수 (Harmonized Index of Consumer Prices) 가 예상대로 2.7% 에 도달했습니다.
items.summary_ko: 5월 독일의 HICP (Harmonized Index of Consumer Prices) 데이터는 예상대로 전년 대비 2.7% (YoY) 에 도달했습니다. 월간 기준으로 HICP 성장률은 0.1% 감소했습니다.

items.title: United Kingdom GDP declines by 0.1% MoM in April, as expected
items.summary: The UK Gross Domestic Product (GDP) contracted by 0.1% MoM in April, following a 0.3% rise reported in March, the latest data published by the Office for National Statistics (ONS) showed on Friday.
items.summary_ko: 영국 국내총생산 (GDP) 은 지난 3월에 0.3% 상승한 후 4월에 0.1% MoM에 의해 계약되었으며, 국가 통계국 (ONS) 이 발표한 최신 데이터는 금요일에 나타났습니다.
